since_last: 62% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.76%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.33% · BTC -0.52% · Gold +0.02% · Nasdaq100 +0.82%. 62% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.76%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.76%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.89%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at +6.46%
cards.body: Leaders: TER +6.46%, AMBA +4.66%, MU +3.99%, INTC +3.64%, GOOGL +3.55%. Laggards: NOW -3.91%, ORCL -3.60%, ADBE -3.60%, INTU -3.44%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.48% at $120.91
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.48% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
